nasb.text: The dead bodies of this people will be food for the birds of the sky and for the beasts of the earth; and no one will frighten them away.

esv.text: And the dead bodies of this people will be food for the birds of the air, and for the beasts of the earth, and none will frighten them away.

cnv.text: “這人民的屍體，也必給空中的飛鳥和地上的野獸作食物，沒有人來驅趕。

ccb.text: 飞鸟和走兽必吃这百姓的尸体，无人驱赶它们。
